home.hero.title: Buy it, sell it, or source it — all on one trusted platform.
home.hero.lede: Zafir360 sources verified goods from Turkish and Chinese factories, lets Iraqi businesses buy at wholesale and resell to consumers, and delivers every order through JayakHub. One stock movement updates all three tiers at once.
home.hero.searchPlaceholder: Search factories, products, or an HS code…
home.listing.title: Open a listing, see everything at once.
home.listing.lede: No digging through tabs for the numbers that decide an order — MOQ, lead time, origin, and live stock sit right on the card.

home.sameProduct.title: The same product, sold three times.
home.sameProduct.lede: A factory item can carry MOQ pricing for a wholesale buyer, land in a reseller's storefront with one click, and reach a consumer's doorstep — all without a single duplicated record.
home.sameProduct.tile1.label: Live Sync
home.sameProduct.tile1.title: Sell it once, everywhere sees it.
home.sameProduct.tile1.desc: Buyers get MOQ and price tiers, sellers get their cost, shoppers get the retail price — same product, one truth. Move one unit and the count drops everywhere at once.
home.sameProduct.tile2.desc: features for buying direct from the factory
home.sameProduct.tile3.desc: features for reselling what you bought
home.sameProduct.tile4.desc: features for shopping and getting it delivered
home.sameProduct.tile6.desc: ways the platform earns on one item, moving once
home.sameProduct.tile7.desc: microservices, none of them yours to run
home.sameProduct.tile8.desc: languages, Arabic first — not bolted on after
home.sameProduct.tile5b.desc: of wholesale funds held until delivery is confirmed
home.sameProduct.tile9.desc: uptime target, backed by a Bahrain-to-Frankfurt failover
home.sameProduct.tile10.desc: net earnings post automatically, no request needed
home.alibabaTrust.title: Alibaba's trust problem. Amazon's missing wholesale layer. Noon's foreign roots.
home.alibabaTrust.proof1.label: Factories visited before listing
home.alibabaTrust.proof2.label: RFQs completed
home.alibabaTrust.proof3.label: Governorates covered
home.alibabaTrust.proof4.label: Lost to unreleased escrow
home.alibabaTrust.quote1: Importing wholesale and reselling on the same platform cut our sourcing time in half.
home.alibabaTrust.quote2: Buyers trust the verified badge enough that we stopped fielding 'is this real' messages entirely.
home.alibabaTrust.quote3: Payouts landing every 7 days like clockwork let us reinvest in stock without waiting on cash flow.
home.alibabaTrust.comparison1.title: vs. Alibaba
home.alibabaTrust.comparison1.desc: Every supplier is personally visited by Sam before it goes live. Trust is built in, not optional.
home.alibabaTrust.comparison2.title: vs. Amazon
home.alibabaTrust.comparison2.desc: Full wholesale import — MOQ, container pricing, proforma invoices, L/C, freight — sits on top of consumer retail.
home.alibabaTrust.comparison3.title: vs. Noon
home.alibabaTrust.comparison3.desc: Iraqi-founded, Arabic-first, with local operations and delivery owned through the JayakHub integration.
home.alibabaTrust.comparison4.title: vs. Souq / Amazon.ae
home.alibabaTrust.comparison4.desc: Built for Iraqi consumers and importers natively in Arabic — not a UAE storefront in English.
home.alibabaTrust.comparison5.title: vs. Temu
home.alibabaTrust.comparison5.desc: No factory-direct dropshipping gamble — every supplier is inspected before a single order ships, not after complaints pile up.
home.alibabaTrust.comparison6.title: vs. Trade Shows
home.alibabaTrust.comparison6.desc: No flight to Istanbul or Guangzhou needed — the same verified factories, RFQs, and pricing tiers, from a phone in Baghdad.

home.capabilities.cat1.title: Customer Experience
home.capabilities.cat2.title: Seller Tools
home.capabilities.cat3.title: Payment & Finance

home.capabilities.cat5.title: Security & Compliance
home.capabilities.cat6.title: Admin & Management
home.oneOrder.title: How a purchase moves through Zafir360.
home.oneOrder.step1.title: RFQ to a verified factory
home.oneOrder.step1.desc: A buyer sends an RFQ to up to five Zafir360-verified suppliers; escrow holds funds once a quote is accepted.
home.oneOrder.step2.title: Import into a storefront
home.oneOrder.step2.desc: A marketplace seller one-click imports the same product into their store at retail pricing.
home.oneOrder.step3.title: Consumer checkout
home.oneOrder.step3.desc: A Baghdad shopper pays by Cash on Delivery or a local wallet in a three-step checkout.
home.oneOrder.step4.title: JayakHub delivery
home.oneOrder.step4.desc: A driver is assigned, tracked live, and a proof-of-delivery photo closes the order.
home.cta.title: See how a single order moves through the system.
home.cta.lede: From factory RFQ to a doorstep in Baghdad — walk through the architecture, the trust framework, or the seller economics.
home.simpleSteps.title: Shopping on Zafir360,
home.simpleSteps.step1.title: Browse
home.simpleSteps.step1.desc: Search products, factories, or an HS code across every tier.
home.simpleSteps.step2.title: Order
home.simpleSteps.step2.desc: Pay by cash on delivery, local wallet, or escrow — pick what suits you.
home.simpleSteps.step3.title: Delivered
home.simpleSteps.step3.desc: JayakHub tracks your order live, door to door, anywhere in Iraq.

about.hero.title: Empowering Iraq’s digital economy.
about.hero.lede: Zafir360 is transforming Iraqi commerce by connecting buyers and sellers through trust, technology, and a unified marketplace. We enable seamless transactions, empower local businesses, and drive the growth of Iraq’s digital economy.
about.mission.title: Connect communities.
about.mission.card1.title: Connect Communities
about.mission.card1.desc: Bridging all 18 governorates of Iraq — e-commerce built to be accessible, inclusive, and convenient for every citizen.
about.mission.card2.title: Empower Entrepreneurs
about.mission.card2.desc: Sellers get real tools, data-driven insight, and education to grow — not just a listing page.
about.mission.card3.title: Trust & Security
about.mission.card3.desc: Secure transactions, transparent processes, and buyer protection — the baseline, not the upsell.
about.values.title: What we won’t compromise on.
about.values.card1.title: Customer-Centric
about.values.card1.desc: Every decision, every feature, is designed around what our users actually need.
about.values.card2.title: Trust & Safety
about.values.card2.desc: A secure environment for buyers and sellers — reliable transactions, long-term confidence.
about.values.card3.title: Continuous Innovation
about.values.card3.desc: Technology and analytics that keep improving the platform, not just maintaining it.
about.values.card4.title: Inclusion & Accessibility
about.values.card4.desc: Open to sellers from every region, background, and business size — not just the biggest.
about.journey.title: From idea to Iraq’s marketplace.
about.journey.step1.title: 2020 · Founded
about.journey.step1.desc: Zafir360 was founded with a bold vision to digitise Iraqi commerce, empower local entrepreneurs, and modernise trade nationwide.
about.journey.step2.title: 2021 · Platform Launch
about.journey.step2.desc: Officially launched in Baghdad with 100 sellers — a user-friendly platform and the foundation for a nationwide marketplace.
about.journey.step3.title: 2022 · National Expansion
about.journey.step3.desc: Rapidly expanded to all 18 governorates, connecting rural and urban communities with seamless digital transactions.
about.journey.step4.title: 2024 · Scaling Growth
about.journey.step4.desc: Surpassed 10,000 active sellers and hundreds of thousands of listings — Iraq’s leading e-commerce platform.
about.cta.title: Shape the future of Iraqi commerce.
about.cta.lede: Join thousands of sellers building thriving businesses on Zafir360 and driving the growth of Iraq’s digital economy.

features.stackbar.title: Every tier is built to deliver, not to decorate.
features.stackbar.desc: Core platform capabilities dominate the feature count — infrastructure and trust outnumber every commercial tier. A marketplace is easy to sketch; keeping the machine honest underneath is the actual job.
features.featureChart.title: Every feature has a spec ID, a domain, and a reason.
features.featureChart.desc: Nothing here is hypothetical — every card links back to a numbered requirement in the platform specification. Open the tier that matches your business.

footer.newsletterLede: Product drops, wholesale deals, and platform updates — no spam.
footer.slogan: Iraq’s premier B2B2C marketplace — connecting verified suppliers, wholesale buyers, marketplace sellers, and consumers under one platform.
footer.newsletterFinePrint: Join 4,000+ sellers and buyers already subscribed. Unsubscribe anytime.
